title: 皐月賞の後に・挑戦は終わらない！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio runs her heart out, but unfortunately,
first place slips from her grasp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She is deeply saddened to know that she can no
longer claim the title of Triple Crown champion
like Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that even though she cannot stand
beside Symboli Rudolf, she can still surpass her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her resolve blazing anew, Tokai Teio immediately
starts training for the Japanese Derby without
even a day's rest.
